review: slowest most unresponsive broken app i think ive ever used. i think i could get the newest call of duty to run on a smartfridge faster than i can get this app to load
Latest update is so buggy. It charges me and then hangs and crashes

I would rate this app 0 if it were possible. It has a lot of features, but nothing works properly. Orders disappear and I have to waste time sorting it out with the staff. Points don’t get credited because the one-time codes don’t work. McDonald’s is a huge company — are you really unable to make a properly functioning app?

absolutely pointless app. I couldn't place my order until I was at the restaurant which defeats the point of mobile order. When it would let me place an order the little fries kept jumping around for over 5 minutes that I closed the app and walked out . I double checked with the staff and the order never went through.
